name: Amethyst Sombrero Galaxy
description: You have been assigned the Amethyst Sombrero Galaxy — a regal Sombrero-class spiral draped in rich amethyst and deep violet. Its high central bulge towers above a prominent dark dust lane carved like velvet, while violet internal emissions glow from within, giving this ancient galaxy the authority and splendour of a cosmic crown.

attributes.value: Velvet-carved dark dust lane with violet internal emissions
